zh.Pawlett, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特帕福萊特
zh.Paulett, Bridgwater, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特布利其沃特
zh.Bridgwater, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特布利其沃特
zh.Melcomb, Paulett, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特霍爾可姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Paulett II於1354年出生在英國薩默塞特時，他的父親Sir John Paulet57歲，母親Elizabeth Reyney29歲。他於大約1376年與Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1391年11月28日在他的家鄉享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Paulett II于1354年出生在英国薩默塞特时，他的父亲Sir John Paulet57岁，母亲Elizabeth Reyney29岁。他于大约1376年与Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere在英国英格兰薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1391年11月28日在他的家乡享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Paulett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Middle English pail(l)et ‘bed or mattress of straw, pallet’, sometimes for someone who made or sold pallets.

variants.name: Pollitt
meanings: English (Lancashire): from the personal name Hippolytus, Greek Hippolytos, comprising elements meaning ‘horse’ + ‘to release’ (see Hyppolite ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Paulett II was born in 1354, in Somerset, England, his father, Sir John Paulet, was 57 and his mother, Elizabeth Reyney, was 29. He married Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere about 1376, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 28 November 1391, in his hometown, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Paulett II est né en 1354, à Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Paulet, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Reyney, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere environ 1376, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 28 novembre 1391, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Paulett II 1354 in Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Paulet 57 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Reyney 29. Er hat um 1376 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 28. November 1391 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Paulett II è nato il nel 1354 nel Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir John Paulet, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Reyney, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere circa 1376, nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 28 novembre 1391, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.Melcomb, Paulett, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトホールコンベ
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Paulett IIが1354年にイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父Sir John Pauletは57歳，母Elizabeth Reyneyは29歳であった。約1376年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでElizabeth Creedy De La Bereと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1391年11月28日に故郷で37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Paulett II(이)가 1354년 영국 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Paulet(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Reyney(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1391년 11월 28일 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Paulett, Bridgwater, Somerset, England: Bridgwater, Bro an Hañv, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Paulett II nasceu em 1354, em Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Paulet, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Reyney, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere aproximadamente 1376, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de novembro de 1391, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Paulett II родился в 1354 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Paulet было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Reyney, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere около 1376 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 28 ноября 1391 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Paulett II nació en 1354, en Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Paulet, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Reyney, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Creedy De La Bere aproximadamente 1376, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 28 de noviembre de 1391, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años.
